---
name: Bug report
about: Something Watson got wrong or crashed on
labels: bug
---

**What happened?**
<!-- A clear description of the bug. -->

**Command run**
```
watson examine ...
```

**Expected behaviour**
<!-- What should have happened. -->

**Actual behaviour**
<!-- What actually happened. Paste the full terminal output if possible. -->

**Watson doctor output**
```
paste watson doctor output here
```

**Watson version**
```
watson --version
```

**OS / Python version**
<!-- e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, Python 3.11 -->

**File that triggered the bug**
<!-- If the file is shareable and small enough, attach it. Otherwise describe its type and rough size. -->
